title: malva leonardii
intro: Malva leonardii, also known as marshmallow root, is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the mallow family (Malvaceae). Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Malva leonardii is valued for its anti-inflammatory and soothing properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been used to treat digestive problems, such as diarrhea and irritable bowel syndrome, as well as respiratory issues, including coughs and bronchitis. Malva leonardii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its health benefits also include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting healthy digestion.
